demo_timestamps.description: Demonstrating the workflow for Tandem connect
Demo of connecting Azure Function to BIM model
Demo of Pro-Score platform performance center functionality

client_mentions.name: SPIE
client_mentions.context: Service provider mentioned at the beginning

summary: The video discusses the integration of IoT data into Autodesk Tandem using the Pro-Score platform to enhance building management systems. It demonstrates how the integration supports operational intelligence by providing insights through digital twins, and also touches on client perspectives regarding the trade-offs between benefits and maintenance costs of digital twin models.
